steps.title: Rewrite the given line
steps.content:
A system has no solution when the two lines are parallel and distinct. Rewrite the given equation:
$$3x=45y-27$$
$$45y=3x+27$$
$$y=\frac{x}{15}+\frac{3}{5}$$
So the second line needs slope $$\frac{1}{15}$$ and a different intercept.

steps.title: Find the parallel choice
steps.content: Rewrite the matching second equation: $$\frac{1}{3}x=5y$$ $$y=\frac{x}{15}$$ This has the same slope and a different $y$-intercept, so the system has no solution. The answer is B.
